name: Depth Estimators Are Implicit Neural Fields for 3D Scene Geometry Inpainting and Reconstruction
summary: arXiv:2607.16286v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The 3D geometry of real-world scene data is often incomplete. Mainstream methods use depth estimators to inpaint missing structure. However, their...
description: arXiv:2607.16286v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The 3D geometry of real-world scene data is often incomplete. Mainstream methods use depth estimators to inpaint missing structure. However, their prediction results can be inconsistent with observed geometry, or unreliable on out-of-distribution data. To solve these problems, we propose Neural Depth Field (NDF). Our key insight is that a depth...
author: Yingzhao Jian, Zihao Lin, Hehe Fan
